full_description: Walk Buddy is a walking companion app designed to encourage users to walk more by tracking steps, distance, and calories burned. The app offers rewards and challenges to motivate users to reach their fitness goals. With Walk Buddy, users can set daily step goals and track their progress over time. The app also allows users to compete with friends and join challenges to make walking a fun and social activity. Key features include: step tracking, distance tracking, calorie burn tracking, rewards and challenges, social sharing, and customizable goals. Whether you're looking to improve your overall health or simply want to stay active, Walk Buddy is the perfect companion to help you achieve your goals.
